title: Best Buy’s Black Friday in July Sale Is Your Second Chance at Snagging Prime Day Deals
author: Kat Merck
text:
All products featured on WIRED are independently selected by our editors. However, we may receive compensation from retailers and/or from purchases of products through these links. Learn more.TIRED of the heat waves and wildfire smoke? Just pretend it’s November already with Best Buy’s annual Black Friday in July sale, happening now. The deals aren’t necessarily as good as they were on Prime Day, but if you missed out on that event, this is your next best bet to grab that laptop or tablet for less. It’s a good buying opportunity if your kid needs new gear for their upcoming semester at college or if you’d simply rather avoid the fall rush to shop for a new TV.We test all the latest devices year-round and give our honest takes on everything. Below are hand-picked deals on gear our experts would buy for themselves. Don't wait—the deals end Sunday, July 26.For more in-depth information on our testing, check out our guides to the Best TVs, Best Art TVs, Best Laptops, Best iPad to Buy, Best Tablets, Best Headphones, and Best Bluetooth Speakers.TV DealsPhotograph: Ryan WaniataPhotograph: Ryan WaniataPhotograph: Ryan WaniataPhotograph: Ryan WaniataLGB5 OLED$650 $600 (8% off) Best Buy (48-inch)We crowned this model the best budget OLED TV, and it’s one of the best value buys available, even when it’s not on sale. We especially like its natural-looking colors and solid 4K gaming bona fides.
Photograph: Martin CizmarPhotograph: Martin CizmarHisenseCanvasTV S7N$1,300 $650 (50% off) Best Buy (50-Inch)$1,300 $648 (50% off) Amazon (50-inch)Art TVs are hot right now, and this is one of our favorites. When you’re not using it as a TV, it comes with a library of 1,000 non-subscription works of art you can display. Or you can just feature your own photos from your Google account.
Apple DealsPhotograph: Luke LarsenPhotograph: Luke LarsenPhotograph: Luke LarsenPhotograph: Luke LarsenAppleMacBook Air (M5, 2026)$1,299 $1,199 (8% off) Best Buy$1,260 Amazon$1,256 Walmart$1,299 AppleThe best MacBook for most people, this model features Apple’s most recent processor, the M5 chip. Given that Apple recently raised its price by $200 on the 13-inch model, this is $100 more than the base price you may have seen earlier this year, but it's as good a deal as you'll find right now.
Photograph: Parker HallPhotograph: Parker HallPhotograph: Parker HallAppleAirPods Pro 3$250 $200 (20% off) Best Buy$249 $200 (20% off) Amazon$249 AppleApple's latest AirPods Pro are the most popular headphones on the market. They earned a rare 9/10 rating from former WIRED A/V editor Parker Hall for their improved noise-cancelling capability, selection of four ear tip sizes, and new tools, like heart-rate sensing and live translation.
Tablet DealsPhotograph: Julian ChokkattuSamsungGalaxy Tab S10+ and Tab S10 Ultra$1,200 $850 (29% off) Best Buy (Ultra)$1,100 $900 (18% off) Best Buy (Plus)$1,100 $749 (32% off) Amazon (Plus)$1,100 Samsung (Plus)Save $350 on the Ultra model of this previous-generation tablet that’s easy to love, with multiday battery life and a smooth display.
Photograph: Brenda StolyarPhotograph: Brenda StolyarAppleiPad (2025, A16)$449 $399 (11% off) Best Buy$449 $399 (11% off) Amazon$449 Walmart$449 AppleThe iPad we recommended for most people is $50 off right now and sports Apple’s new A16 chip. There’s not enough RAM to support Apple Intelligence, but this is still a well-rounded-enough tablet to consider.
Bluetooth Speaker DealsPhotograph: Ryan WaniataPhotograph: Ryan WaniataPhotograph: Ryan WaniataJBLFlip 7$150 $100 (33% off) Best Buy$150 $100 (33% off) Amazon$150 $100 (33% off) Walmart$150 $100 (33% off) JBLSave $50 on one of our favorite Bluetooth speakers that can take all manner of abuse. It's IP68 water-resistant, shock-tested for 1-meter drops, and has a 14-hour battery life.
Photograph: Ryan WaniataPhotograph: Ryan WaniataPhotograph: Ryan WaniataPhotograph: Ryan WaniataBoseSoundlink Plus$269 $199 (26% off) Best Buy$269 $199 (26% off) Amazon$269 $199 (26% off) BoseMost outlets are knocking $70 off the price of our favorite midsize speaker right now, but Best Buy is the seller that carries all the colors, including this cool Citrus Yellow, Sunset Peach, and Blue Dusk.
Home Tech DealsPhotograph: Adrienne SoRoborockQrevo Curv$1,600 $650 (59% off) Best Buy$850 AmazonThis 2024 flagship model is not new, but former WIRED reviewer Ryan Waniata said it was the best robot vacuum he’d ever used. This is one of the best prices for it that you’ll see.
Photograph: Matthew KorfhagePhotograph: Matthew KorfhageNinjaSlushi Machine$350 $300 (14% off) Best Buy$350 $298 (15% off) AmazonFifty bucks off isn’t exactly a doorbuster for this machine, but come on, who doesn’t need a frozen marg? This was our favorite slushie machine until we tried the Ninja XL, but it’s still a great entry-level model if you're looking to round out the rest of your summer with frozen drinks.
